stories.headline: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
stories.description: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.

stories.headline: Russia attacks Odesa, claims Ukraine hit Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
stories.description: Ukrainian attack on captured Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant kills one worker, according to managers installed by Russia.

stories.headline: Less bread and WFH Fridays – what Pret boss knows about our habits
stories.description: Customers want great value but that doesn't necessarily mean the cheapest products, says Pano Christou.

stories.headline: Iran’s top diplomat in Russia as Tehran intensifies efforts to end the war
stories.description: Pakistan and Oman remain involved in backchannel efforts to prevent a return to open US-Israel war on Iran.
